      • straceErrConverter,PosStr,ShellCmd,Option[HsLexer[StrTok]]

Collection of helper procs to convert output of various command programs to json

Imports

hshell, hjson, tscanf, hstring_algo, halgorithm, hlex_base, hparse_base, base_errors, hdebug_misc, helpers

Types

StrTok = HsTok[StrTokKind]

Procs

proc readLine(stream: Stream): string {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError],
                                        tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc lslOutConverter(stream: var PosStr; cmd: ShellCmd; state: var Option[void]): Option[
    JsonNode] {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError],
                tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc lslErrConverter(stream: var PosStr; cmd: ShellCmd; state: var Option[void]): Option[
    JsonNode] {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc lexCall(str: var PosStr): Option[StrTok] {...}{.
    raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError, ImplementError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc parseCall(lex: var HsLexer[StrTok]): StraceRecord {...}{.raises: [IOError,
    OSError, ParseFail, UnexpectedKindError, UnexpectedTokenError, ValueError,
    ArgumentError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc straceOutConverter(str: var PosStr; cmd: ShellCmd;
                        state: var Option[HsLexer[StrTok]]): Option[StraceRecord] {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
proc straceErrConverter(str: var PosStr; cmd: ShellCmd;
                        state: var Option[HsLexer[StrTok]]): Option[StraceRecord] {...}{.raises: [
    IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError, ImplementError, ParseFail,
    UnexpectedKindError, UnexpectedTokenError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
